title: pagaea subcordata
intro: Pagaea subcordata, also known as Pagaea subcordata, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pagaea subcordata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
